name: proof-phase-clara-kai-late-call-regression
description: Reduced proof-phase regression for the late-call Clara to Kai handoff after several earlier specialist demos and a short Clara receptionist reset.

userTurns.label: Maren scheduling scenario
userTurns.text: Maren, in one short answer, offer the earliest useful visit next week for our Potsdam satellite after two cancellations at the Berlin office.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for qualification
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Jonas qualification scenario
userTurns.text: Jonas, in one short qualification summary, assess a multi-service business that wants lead triage, appointment routing, and a launch this month.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for documentation
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Tobias documentation scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, in one short quote-ready summary, turn this voice note into a draft: recurring leak at the satellite location, damaged insulation near two skylights, lift access only, and same-week turnaround requested.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for follow-up
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Clara receptionist reset
userTurns.text: Clara, stay with me and show the receptionist demo.

userTurns.label: Lina follow-up scenario
userTurns.text: Lina, in one short demo summary, describe the confirmation, reminder, and satisfaction check after a booking.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara for operations
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.
